'''''Episode I: The Phantom Menace'' ½''' was a comic story published in [[WIZARD Magazine]] on [[July 21]], [[1999]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]]. A promotional story for {{Film|I}}, it was later collected in the [[Star Wars: Episode I Adventures (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: Episode I Adventures'' trade paperback]].
